description: Current coherence state of the Applied Narrative

drift_events.description: Enterprise landing page mentions 'self-hosted deployment available' but feature status is 'Beta' with ship date Dec 1
drift_events.suggested_resolution: Update copy to 'self-hosted deployment coming December 2024' or wait until ship date to claim availability

drift_events.description: Blog post draft uses 'Code Pilot' (two words) instead of canonical 'CodePilot'
drift_events.suggested_resolution: Replace all instances of 'Code Pilot' with 'CodePilot'

drift_events.description: Homepage claims '3x faster reviews' but no proof metric supports this claim. Closest metric [perf-002] shows 73% cycle time reduction.
drift_events.suggested_resolution: Change claim to '73% faster review cycles' with link to proof, or add new verified metric for '3x' claim

drift_events.description: perf-003 shows false positive rate improved from 12% to 4.8% (60% improvement) but this achievement is not prominently featured in messaging
drift_events.suggested_resolution: Consider adding accuracy improvement story to messaging pillars or blog content

drift_events.description: Sales deck slide 7 uses 'revolutionary AI technology' - 'revolutionary' is on forbidden language list
drift_events.suggested_resolution: Replace 'revolutionary AI technology' with 'fundamentally different approach to code review'

active.message: perf-002 (Review Cycle Time Reduction) verification date is 35 days old - approaching 60-day refresh threshold
